notes: Minor polish over 3.9.0: the launch screen now renders cleanly.
3.9.0 brought the calm, ocean-inspired 'Swell' redesign — every download shows its stage at a glance, settings in a slide-over, and a new icon.
Includes all 3.8.x capabilities: hardware-accelerated conversions, parallel downloads, self-updating engine, and YouTube live-stream support.
